response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with relevant cloud and AI-adjacent work (e.g., MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) and leadership roles, but lacks direct GenAI production expertise (e.g., vector databases, RAG optimization) and multi-agent system frameworks. His background in multiple languages and cloud platforms (AWS, Node.js) is valuable, but the resume doesn't emphasize AI-specific projects or enterprise GenAI delivery. The 'maybe' reflects potential with additional screening.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering with leadership in cloud-native and agentic workflows (e.g., MCP at re:cinq)
Proven ability to design and optimize systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation with TypeScript/AWS CDK at Optilyz)
Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems and performance optimization (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, which are core to the role
Limited evidence of AI-specific production delivery (e.g., LLM integration, evaluation pipelines) beyond general agentic tooling
Lacks multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) or advanced LLM optimization metrics in resume
